dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: View an overview of your store

products.title: Products
products.description: Add, edit, and manage your products
products.searchPlaceholder: Search by product name or SKU...

newProduct.title: New Product
newProduct.slugHint: Auto-generated from the product name. You can also edit it manually.

orders.title: Orders
orders.description: Review orders and manage their statuses

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.description: View and manage stock levels by SKU
inventory.lowStockMessage: Some SKUs are below the low stock threshold (10 or fewer). We recommend restocking soon.

subscription.title: Plan Management
subscription.description: View and change your current subscription plan

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Stay on top of orders, inventory, and buyer inquiries

body.orderPaid: Payment for order #{orderId} is confirmed. Start preparing the shipment.
body.inventoryLowStock: SKU {sku} ({productName}) stock is down to {quantity} units.
body.sellerApproved: Your store application has been approved. You can start listing products now.

inquiries.title: Inquiries
inquiries.bodyPlaceholder: Write your reply to the buyer
inquiries.errorGeneric: A network error occurred. Please try again later.

apiTokens.title: API Tokens
apiTokens.description: Issue and manage access tokens for programmatic API access. Tokens grant scoped access to your seller data — treat them like passwords.
apiTokens.empty: No API tokens yet. Click "New token" to create your first one.

create.title: Create API token
create.description: Choose a descriptive name and select the minimum scopes this token will need. You can always revoke and re-issue later.
create.name: Name
create.expiresAtHint: Leave empty for no expiration. Short-lived tokens are safer for CI jobs.

reveal.title: Your new API token
reveal.description: Paste it into your target system now — this is the only time you will see the plaintext.
reveal.warningBody: You will not be able to see it again. If you lose it, you must revoke this token and issue a new one.

confirmRevoke.title: Revoke API token
confirmRevoke.description: This immediately invalidates the token. Any scripts or integrations using it will start receiving 401 errors. This cannot be undone.

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load API tokens. Please refresh and try again.

cancellationRequests.title: Cancellation Requests
cancellationRequests.description: Review buyer cancellation requests and approve or reject them.
cancellationRequests.empty: No cancellation requests match this filter

approveModal.title: Approve this cancellation?
approveModal.description: Approving will trigger a Stripe refund and release the reserved stock. This action cannot be undone.

rejectModal.title: Reject this cancellation?
rejectModal.description: A comment is required so the buyer understands why you are rejecting the request.
rejectModal.commentPlaceholder: e.g. The order has already been prepared for shipment

errors.refundFailed: Stripe refund failed. Please contact support
errors.transferReversalFailed: Transfer reversal failed. Please contact support
